evidence.scientific_clarity: Dose-dependent suppression is visible with violin+box+jitter and *** brackets for all three comparisons vs Control; however, the Combo median (0.333) falls below the lowest y-axis tick (0.5), making it hard to read the key finding directly off the axis.
evidence.typography: pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype=none both set; Arial is the first font in the stack and confirmed embedded in PDF as CID TrueType (GOFYPY+ArialMT); axis labels 8-9 pt, consistent and readable.
evidence.palette: Okabe-Ito subset used: neutral grey (Control), light blue / deep blue (dose gradient), vermillion (Combo); no red/green directional confusion; colorblind-safe by design.
evidence.layout_density: Upper ~23% of y-range is bracket-only whitespace (ylim top ~3.92 vs data max ~3.0); lowest tick at 0.5 leaves Combo data region (median 0.333) without a tick reference; otherwise panels are well-filled.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure content and order; significance brackets present with correct *** labels; no legend needed (x-axis labels serve that role); the missing y-tick below 0.5 for the key Combo result would likely draw a reviewer comment.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF is real vector (Matplotlib PDF backend, 35 kB); pdffonts confirms one embedded CID TrueType font (Arial); pdftotext extracts all labels correctly; no rasterized elements detected.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (35 kB), figure.png (139 kB, 1769x1322 @ 300 dpi), figure.svg (81 kB), caption.tex (525 B), gen_figure.py (5.4 kB) all present and non-trivial.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states the scientific claim, quantifies it with specific medians (0.333 vs 0.941, 64.6% reduction), describes plot geometry (violin, box, jitter, alpha), and reports the statistical test (Mann-Whitney U, N=100).

overall_strengths: Excellent typography and vector fidelity: pdf.fonttype=42, svg.fonttype=none, Arial embedded as CID TrueType, all text selectable in both PDF and SVG.
Colorblind-safe Okabe-Ito palette with disciplined directional use (blue gradient for dose, vermillion accent for Combo) and a well-structured caption with a concrete numerical finding.
overall_weaknesses: Y-axis ticks start at 0.5 but the key result (Combo median 0.333) lies below that mark, leaving the most important data region without a readable scale reference.
Bracket stacking consumes ~23% of the y-range as empty headroom above the data, compressing the violin bodies and reducing the effective use of panel space.
